gene_region.label: CYP2D6 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical CYP2D6 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: CYP2D6 encodes cytochrome P450 2D6, a polymorphic drug-metabolizing monooxygenase. This bundle emphasizes phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local CYP2D6 bundle is pharmacogenomic drug metabolism oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: CYP2D6 variants can alter or tag phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: CYP2D6 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for CYP2D6.
Because CYP2D6 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use CYP2D6 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000100197: CYP2D6 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: CYP2D6 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: CYP2D6: phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a CYP2D6 pharmacogenomic drug metabolism thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology and CYP2D6 pharmacogenomics context, Drug exposure and adverse-response biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs3892097 (CYP2D6*4 splice marker) is curated as a CYP2D6 marker for CYP2D6 pharmacogenomics context, Drug exposure and adverse-response biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag phase I drug oxidation, copy-number and star-allele pharmacogenetics, antidepressant/opioid/beta-blocker metabolism, and poor/ultrarapid metabolizer biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a CYP2D6 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs3892097 (CYP2D6*4 splice marker) with CYP2D6 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
